about.subtitle: Your Personal Watch Collection Studio
about.heroDescription: The premier platform for watch enthusiasts who demand excellence in managing their collection. Track, analyze, and curate your timepieces with unprecedented precision.
about.watchSpecsDescription: Track movements, case materials, water resistance, market values, wear history, warranty details, complications, rarity, and historical significance for every timepiece in your collection.
about.showcaseDescription: From vintage dress watches to modern tool watches — Luxury Vault gives each timepiece the attention it deserves.
about.platformFeaturesDesc: Everything you need to manage your watch collection
about.analyticsDashboardDesc: Collection statistics, spending analytics, purchase timelines, and depreciation tracking.
about.wearTrackingDesc: Log usage with calendars, monthly grids, and associate wears with trips, events, and sports.
about.aiInsightsDesc: Collection analysis, taste profiling, sentiment analysis, gap suggestions, and the Vault Pal chatbot.
about.communityTradingDesc: Friends, messaging, forums, trade matching, trust levels, and wishlist sharing.
about.tripsEventsDesc: Document occasions and associate your watches with travel and special moments.
about.securePrivateDesc: Row-level security, two-factor authentication, login history, and encrypted data storage.
about.contactDescription: For support or feedback, use the Submit Feedback feature in the app or reach out through messaging. You can also connect with the community through the Forum.
about.copyright: © 2025 Luxury Vault. All rights reserved. Version 1.0

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Luxury Vault
faq.clickToSee: Click on a question to see the answer
faq.a1: Luxury Vault is a comprehensive watch collection management platform for watch enthusiasts. It gives you tools to track, organize, analyze, and share your timepieces all in one place.
faq.q2: What watch details can I track?
faq.a2: Luxury Vault tracks comprehensive watch specifications including movement type, case material, case size, crystal type, water resistance, power reserve, lug-to-lug measurements, complications, band/bracelet, caseback material, rarity, historical significance, and market values (cost, MSRP, and resale price).
faq.q3: How do I create a collection?
faq.a3: After signing in, you'll be prompted to create your first collection. Choose a name for your watch collection. You can create multiple collections and switch between them using the collection switcher.
faq.q4: How do I add a watch to my collection?
faq.a4: Navigate to the Collection page and click the 'Add Watch' button. Fill in the details such as brand, model, dial color, and specifications. You can also upload photos and documentation like warranty cards.
faq.q5: What is Wrist Check / Wear Tracking?
faq.a5: Wrist Check lets you log which watch you're wearing each day. You can associate entries with trips, events, sports activities, or water usage. Over time, you'll see wear patterns through calendars, charts, and monthly grids.
faq.a6: Trips and Events let you document special occasions and associate them with the watches you wore. Track locations, dates, duration, and which timepieces accompanied you — building a timeline of memories with your collection.
faq.a7: The Wishlist lets you track watches you're interested in acquiring. Add brand, model, and preferred specs. The system can also match your wishlist with other users who have those watches available for trade.
faq.a8: When you mark a watch as 'Open to Trade', the system automatically matches it with other users' wishlists. If there's a match, both parties receive a notification and can connect through messaging to discuss a potential exchange.
faq.a9: Water Usage tracking lets you log activities where you've used a watch in water (swimming, diving, snorkeling, etc.). This helps monitor water exposure relative to your watch's water resistance rating.
faq.q10: What are Collection Insights and AI features?
faq.a10: Luxury Vault offers several AI-powered features: Collection Insights analyzes your taste profile and wear patterns, Sentiment Analysis evaluates your feelings about each watch, Watch Metadata Analysis enriches specs automatically, and the Vault Pal chatbot assistant answers questions about your collection.
faq.q11: Can I share my collection with others?
faq.a11: Yes! You can add friends through the social features and share watch details via messaging. You can also grant other users viewer or editor access to your collections. The Forum lets you post and discuss with the community.
faq.q12: What is the Trust Level system?
faq.a12: Trust Levels (Observer, Collector, Verified Collector, Trusted Trader) reflect a user's standing in the community. Higher trust levels are assigned by admins based on activity and completed trades, helping users gauge reliability for trade opportunities.
faq.a13: When adding or editing a watch, you can set warranty dates and upload warranty card photos. The system tracks warranty status and sends notifications before warranties expire.
faq.q14: What Personal Notes and Lists can I create?
faq.a14: Personal Notes let you keep private observations about your watches. Lists allow you to organize watches into custom groupings beyond your main collection — for example, 'Daily Rotation', 'Grails', or 'For Sale'.
faq.a15: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. Row-level security policies ensure you can only access your own data. Two-factor authentication (MFA) and login history tracking are available for additional account protection.
faq.q16: How can I export my data?
faq.a16: Administrators can export watch inventory, wear logs, and full data exports through the Admin panel. The platform also supports importing data via spreadsheet upload.
faq.q17: How do I submit feedback or report issues?
faq.a17: Use the 'Submit Feedback' option available in the app to send bug reports, feature requests, or general feedback directly to the admin team. You can track the status of your submissions as well.

settings.title: Settings
settings.switchTheme: Switch between light and dark mode
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Irreversible actions that affect your account
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This includes all your watches, wear entries, trips, events, collections, and preferences. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete:
settings.deleteWatches: All your watches and their photos
settings.deleteTrips: All trips, events, and water usage records
settings.notificationsDesc: Control which push notifications you receive
settings.avatarDesc: Customize your avatar with a photo or choose a color for your initials.
settings.avatarColorDesc: This color shows when you don't have a photo, or as a fallback.
settings.profileInfoDesc: Your username is displayed in chats and forums to protect your privacy. You can change it anytime.
settings.usernameHint: This is shown in chats, forums, and messages
settings.fullNameHint: Only visible to you in settings
settings.locationDesc: Your location helps match you with nearby collectors for trades.
settings.tradeMatchHint: Only receive trade match notifications from collectors in your selected area.
settings.defaultCollectionDesc: Choose which collection opens by default when you log in
settings.defaultSetAuto: Default collection set to automatic (your owned collection)
settings.failedSaveDefault: Failed to save default collection preference
settings.syncedAcrossDevices: This preference is synced across all your devices.
settings.linkedAccountsDesc: Connect multiple sign-in methods to your account for flexibility and backup access.
settings.canSignInWith: You'll be able to sign in with {{email}} and this password.
settings.passwordAdded: Password added successfully! You can now sign in with email and password.
settings.allMethodsConnected: All available sign-in methods are connected.
settings.unlinkDesc: You will no longer be able to sign in using {{provider}}. Make sure you have another way to access your account.
settings.mustHaveOneMethod: You must have at least one authentication method
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account
settings.twoFactorProtected: Your account is protected with an authenticator app
settings.twoFactorExplain: Protect your account by requiring a verification code from an authenticator app (like Google Authenticator, Authy, or 1Password) when you sign in.
settings.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
settings.sixDigitHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
settings.recoveryCodesDesc: Store these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once to sign in if you lose access to your authenticator app.
settings.codesNotShownAgain: After closing this dialog, you won't be able to see these codes again.
settings.generateNewCodesDescExisting: This will invalidate all your existing recovery codes. Make sure you save the new codes in a safe place.
settings.generateNewCodesDescNew: This will generate 10 new recovery codes that you can use if you lose access to your authenticator app.
settings.disable2faDesc: This will remove the extra security layer from your account. Enter your verification code to confirm.
settings.activeSessionsDesc: Manage your active login sessions across devices
settings.signOutOtherDesc: This will sign you out from all other devices and browsers. Your current session will remain active.
settings.signOutAllDesc: This will sign you out from ALL devices, including this one. You will need to sign in again.
settings.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
